diff: The Avalanche SkyLink Bridge consists of a Token Bridge that allows bridging USDS and sUSDS between Ethereum Mainnet and Avalanche, as well as a Governance Bridge that allows exercising governance control for Sky-issued tokens on Avalanche.
description: Adds documentation for the Avalanche SkyLink Bridge, specifying Freezer Multisig configuration, Rate Limits, and Validator parameters.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
